subject: Re: I Hope you are well.
body:
I don't know  if this was meant for me... who are you?
  who is lisa? what night?

--- hwo cares <llcpower@hotmail.com> wrote:


---------------------------------
Lisa and I went out one night and she got a little
tipsy and told me that you pay her $700 every time she
sent you a young pretty girl. She also told me that
she had massaged you topless...and sometimes with some
of the girls you would help your self in front of
them. Listen knowing that the night you had asked me
to stay over.I tied to ask you but you lied. That is
why I didn't share one drop of my mind or personality
with you.You liking that wouldn't have bother at least
I would have know where you were coming from.
 
I hope All is well with you. What did piss me off is
that she wasn't honest with me and you weren't
truthful. I was really excited about meeting you and
learning and enjoying my time with you .I guess the
joke was on me.Yet the both of you want me to be
truthful and exposé myself, all the while the both of
you where full of shit. I wont bother you ever again I
just wanted to tell you that if you care or not!!
 
I haven't spoken to lisa since the last time I spoke
with you. I hope she is happy and well.







__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
